column9: The whole LCSC cart can be downloaded on GitHub. (To check all the prices and links).
Since 1. July 2026 there will be a new Category Flat Fee, affecting all EU residents, for each category  (HS Code) of items there will be a flat
fee of 3€, the HS Codes for this package are: HS 8541, HS 8533, HS 8532, HS 8534,  8536 which is 5*3€ or 15€. This fee will be added when
checking out (starting on 1.7.2026) automatically. But if I order a package on the 20.6. and the package will arrive to the borders in July I will
still need to pay the fees.
